prompt.content:
The district recently decided to use the average grades of student groups file for recalculating the average grades of students with an ELL program. However, there is a condition: the student should have an attendance rate of minimum 90% to date. If an ELL student has maintained minimum 90% attendance rate to date, their average grade in 9th grade biology class will be recalculated by dropping one of the lowest scores. 
Create a document named Recalculated Student Average Grades. For each individual student in this group, include their names, current attendance rate  (one decimal) from Science class attendance data  and the recalculated average grade, if applicable, in a three column table. When calculating the averages, round the result to the nearest whole number.  If a student does not meet the condition indicate it with a "DMC" under the recalculated average grade column.
